summary_context: Implemented backend notification triggers when tasks and subtasks are assigned to users (FM or SE). Added a sendAssignmentNotifications helper in TaskService.ts to query the users collection in Project A's database for resolving Firestore uids, and add task_assigned notifications to Project B's database collection. Called the triggers asynchronously in createTask, createSubtask, updateSubtask, and WBS Excel importWbs functions.
